meanings.definition: a chemical agent capable of reducing the surface tension of a liquid in which it is dissolved
a workman who wets the work in a manufacturing process
someone suffering from enuresis; someone who urinates while asleep in bed
covered or soaked with a liquid such as water
supporting or permitting the legal production and sale of alcoholic beverages
examples: a wet candidate running on a wet platform

meanings.definition: consisting of or trading in alcoholic liquor
